transcription.text:
Okay, so we're close to Ben Tang Market now, which is notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes. Not only is it incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.
So it seems like there's an abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers, pretty much everything you could need in a fake version. So apparently it's part of the culture here that they love to barter. Never just
what they ask for straight away. Try to bring them a little bit down respectfully, not too much. Don't want to insult them.

segments.text: Okay, so we're close to Ben Tang Market now, which is notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes. Not only is it incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.

So it seems like there's an abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers, pretty much everything you could need in a fake version. So apparently it's part of the culture here that they love to barter. Never just
what they ask for straight away. Try to bring them a little bit down respectfully, not too much. Don't want to insult them.

judge.characteristic_vi: Chợ Bến Thành ở Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh nổi tiếng bán nhiều hàng “hàng giả thật” như túi xách, kính mát và giày thể thao. Chợ rất đông và nóng. Tranh luận giá (trả giá) là một hoạt động phổ biến ở đây, và du khách được khuyên nên thương lượng giá cả một cách tôn trọng.
judge.reason: Bằng chứng video cung cấp thông tin chi tiết cụ thể về các mặt hàng được bán (hàng giả), không khí (đông đúc, nóng bức) và văn hóa mua sắm (trả giá), tất cả đều liên quan trực tiếp đến Chợ Bến Thành.
evidence_quotes: notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes.
Not only is it incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.
So it seems like there's an abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers, pretty much everything you could need in a fake version.

So apparently it's part of the culture here that they love to barter. Never just what they ask for straight away. Try to bring them a little bit down respectfully, not too much. Don't want to insult them.
